summary: Iteration 48 testing complete. Verified new features: 1) /health endpoint returns {status: ok} (internal backend endpoint), 2) startup_event logs 'Copied React build' and 'Copied nginx config' on startup, 3) All core APIs working (login, locations, sponsors, equipment, genres, AI poster). 4) UI working: login flow, dashboard, Film Wizard 12-step indicator, location category filters (Tutte/Studi & Set/Metropoli/Natura/Storici), mobile bottom navbar with 6 icons. All 13 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: External access via Kubernetes ingress routes to SPA fallback (returns HTML). /health is internal endpoint for pod health checks only. Works correctly via localhost:8001.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 7978-8016: startup_event() copies React build to /var/www/html and nginx config to /etc/nginx/sites-available/default ✓
server.py line 7989-7999: yarn build fallback if build directory doesn't exist ✓
nginx.conf line 24-28: /health proxy to localhost:8001 configured ✓
FilmWizard.jsx: 12-step wizard with sticky header, location category filters working ✓
App.js line 562-588: Mobile bottom navbar with 6 icons (Home, Film, Social, Sfide, Chat, Notifiche) ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified new features since iteration 47: 1) /health endpoint at root level (no /api prefix) returns {status: ok} - designed for Kubernetes internal pod health checks. External access goes through K8s ingress which only routes /api/ paths, so /health returns SPA HTML externally (expected behavior). 2) startup_event deploys React build to /var/www/html and nginx config on backend startup - logs confirm 'Copied React build' and 'Copied nginx config'. 3) AI poster /api/ai/poster/start returns task_id for async generation. 4) Mobile bottom navbar has 6 icons visible at 375px width. 5) Film Wizard 12-step indicator and location category filters (Tutte, Studi & Set, Metropoli, Natura, Storici) all working.

health_endpoint.external_note: External access via K8s ingress returns SPA HTML (expected - /health not proxied through ingress)
